question:

B. Temperature
C. Exposure time
D. Damage state
E. Weld bead color

A. Precipitate morphology
B. Crack paths
C. Heat tint bands
D. Surface oxide islands
E. Grip mark spacing

Which properties can trade off when alloying changes phase stability?
A. Oxidation resistance
B. Creep strength
C. Terminal prompt length
D. Git branch name
E. File extension
Remaining life models combine stress, temperature, exposure time, and damage ____.
Electron microscopy can reveal precipitate morphology and crack ____.

golden_answers: It reveals precipitate morphology and crack paths.
